text: 68 common myths nfts are only for art wrong they work for tickets real estate deeds gaming items too i can copy the image yes but you wont own the real nft they have no value value comes from scarcity and what buyers agree to pay

58 real example an artist mints 1 digital artwork as an nft buyer a pays 5 eth ethereum a cryptocurrency for it two years later buyer b offers 12 eth buyer a sells blockchain records both sales everyone sees the history

48 how it works in 3 steps first a creator mints creates an nft writing its details to the blockchain second you buy it and the blockchain updates to show you own it third you can sell trade or hold it anytime

28 nft nonfungible token nonfungible means it cannot be replaced by something identical unlike bitcoin where 1 btc 1 btc each nft has its own value and properties it lives on a blockchain and shows who owns it
